problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
hypothesis: Combining Thermoelectric Seebeck coefficient maximization with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
